description: Style NoteSemi-formal wardrobe updaters - that's what this pair from arrow is! Style it with chinos or corduroy trousers, a tonal jacket and a casual shirt to nail the Friday feel. This pair is great to class up an off-duty ensemble too!Product DetailsChocolate brown pointy toed leather shoes with slip on stylingHas perforations from the midfoot to the heel with two strips across the midfootTongue with brand badge on it and elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongueSoft footbed upper adhered to the outsoleTPR outsole with a stacked heel and a textured forefootMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
